Uri munhu akashata mwoyo, hauna kana mufaro unouya muhupenyu hwako hurefu nemhuri yakaora chose uye asina hupenyu chero. Uri muroyi.
Tatenda chose nekubatsira kwamakaita pakugadzira mugwagwa wedu nezuro mwedzi uno wezhizha rino rinoyevedza zvikuru kune vese.
Unozviita munhu akadzidza asi unhu hwako hwakafanana nemhuka yesango isingazivi runyararo chero rini ripi zvaro chairo iwe.
Ndafara nekuona kuti muzukuru wedu ave kugona kutaura zvakanaka chikoro nezuro uyu mwedzi unoyevedza chose muno mwedzi.
Uri benzi rinofamba richiti rine pfungwa asi uri duutuu chairo mazuva ano eunyengeri hwakazara nemakuhwa mazhinji chose. Uri rema.
Ndinokushuvira makomborero akawanda pazvose zvaunobata nemaoko ako muhupenyu hwasara hurefu chose nemhuri yako.
Uri rema rekupedzisira rinongofungidzira kuti rinodikanwa nevanhu asi uri tsvina chaiyo isingadiwe chero kumusha kana kure kwese.
Zvinofadza kuona kuti vana vacho vari kukudza tsika dzedu pasina kutya vakuru vavo vemazuva ano echirungu aya mazuva ose.
Unoita seunonzwisisa asi musoro wako wakashama semusuwo wemba yasiiwa mazuva ano echirungu nehunyengeri hwega hwega chose. Uri dhidha.
Ndinotenda nerudo rwamakatiratidza patanga tiri mukusuwa mwedzi wakapera uyu nerudo rukuru rwamakaunza kumhuri yedu nezuro.
Uri muroyi wamazuva ano anozora manyepo pamberi pevanhu vakachenjera munyika yedu yakanaka chose uye yakakura chose. Uri munhu akaipa.
Ndafadzwa chose nekuona kurima kwamuri kuita panzvimbo yenyu iyi mwedzi unouya nerudo rwakazara chose muno munharaunda.
Uri imbwa yechirume inongotenderera ichingoda kuruma vanhu pasina kana chikonzero chipi zvacho chaicho nekumanya chose chose iwe.
Ndinokushuvira zororo rine runyararo nekunaka pakupera kwemwedzi uno uyu nerudo rukuru rwakazaruka mazuva ano iwaya emwedzi.
Uri benzi rinofamba rine musoro wakafanana nekapu isina tii isina kana shuga pfungwa dzenyu idzo dzakaora semvura yemadhaka iwayo.
